name: Richest Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sugar and Crisco together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the flour, mixing continuously.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
6. Bake for about one hour at 250-300 degrees Fahrenheit.
